textworld.objective: navigate the maze and collect the coin
textworld.walkthrough_goal: go east then take coin from the pedestal
textworld.agent_summary: took the coin from the pedestal after going east

transitions.feedback: You stand at a crossroads. Exits: east, west.
A pedestal holds a shiny coin.

jericho.goal: enter the house and retrieve the lantern
jericho.walkthrough_summary: open window, enter house, take lantern from table
jericho.agent_summary: opened the window and entered the kitchen

history.observation: West of House. A window is slightly ajar.
With great effort, you open the window.

alfworld.task_desc: put a clean mug in the cabinet
alfworld.expert_plan_summary: take mug, clean mug in sink, put mug in cabinet
alfworld.agent_summary: cleaned the mug and placed it in the cabinet

trajectory.obs: You see a mug on the countertop.

sre.answer: root cause is a cache flush on session-cache; remediate with clear_cache
